_meta.description: Last Epoch set item reference data for The Forge build planner.
_meta.note: Affix ranges are auto-generated from game data. Verify against in-game tooltips.

isadoras_revenge.name: Isadora's Revenge
isadoras_revenge.lore: "...and enraged she arose with murder in her eyes..."

isadoras_tomb_binding.name: Isadora's Tomb Binding
affixes: +80% Physical Lightning Fire Necrotic Player Property
isadoras_tomb_binding.lore: "...with a stake they slew her, and with silver they bound her..."

isadoras_gravechill.name: Isadora's Gravechill
isadoras_gravechill.lore: "...yet her strength was not blood, but of bone..."

the_invokers_frozen_heart.name: The Invoker's Frozen Heart
affixes: +1 Lightning Cold Necrotic Elemental Level Of Skills
the_invokers_frozen_heart.lore: ...alone with ice in his heart, he gained mastery of his art...

the_invokers_scorching_grasp.name: The Invoker's Scorching Grasp
affixes: +1 Void Poison Spell Level Of Skills
the_invokers_scorching_grasp.lore: ...his master fell, a firey death knell...

the_invokers_static_touch.name: The Invoker's Static Touch
affixes: +5–10% Fire Necrotic Poison Elemental Player Property
+1 Lightning Cold Necrotic Spell Level Of Skills
the_invokers_static_touch.lore: ...electrified with ambition, he cast spells beyond his cognition...

blade_of_the_forgotten_knight.name: Blade of the Forgotten Knight
blade_of_the_forgotten_knight.lore: Incongruous shards of iron from distant eras woven together through time.

defiance_of_the_forgotten_knight.name: Defiance of the Forgotten Knight
affixes: +21–28% Physical Lightning Cold Necrotic Player Property
defiance_of_the_forgotten_knight.lore: Dread not the passage of time nor the eternal void beyond.

the_last_bears_fury.name: The Last Bear's Fury
affixes: +3% Physical Cold Fire Necrotic Player Property
the_last_bears_fury.lore: The last bear stood alone against the void, guarding the cave in which she thought her cubs still rested.

the_last_bears_scorn.name: The Last Bear's Scorn
affixes: +100% Lightning Cold Fire Necrotic Player Property
the_last_bears_scorn.lore: The last bear's bloodline survived wars between gods, and empires.

the_last_bears_lament.name: The Last Bear's Lament
the_last_bears_lament.lore: The last bear's ancestors watched as the Temple of Eterra fell from the sky.

halvars_pledge.name: Halvar's Pledge
halvars_pledge.lore: The shaman Halvar bound himself with the spirit of the mountain.

halvars_stand.name: Halvar's Stand
halvars_stand.lore: When Morditas’ army closed in on him, Halvar asked the mountain to bury them together.

last_gift_of_the_mountain.name: Last Gift of the Mountain
affixes: +30–60% Physical Cold Void Necrotic Player Property
last_gift_of_the_mountain.lore: The mountain was sad to lose a friend as true as Halvar.

pebbles_femur.name: Pebbles' Femur
pebbles_femur.lore: Feeding Pebbles was one of my favorite things to do. -Traveling Merchant

pebbles_collar.name: Pebbles' Collar
pebbles_collar.lore: The bones in Pebbles' body respond to metal like a magnet. I’m beginning to think I’m in over my head. -Traveling Merchant

pebbles_bitemarked_sash.name: Pebbles' Bitemarked Sash
pebbles_bitemarked_sash.lore: As I lay in the ditch pulling my entrails back into my body, I wonder; who is the pet now?  -Traveling Merchant

shard_of_the_shattered_lance.name: Shard of the Shattered Lance
affixes: +100% Physical Cold Fire Poison Player Property
shard_of_the_shattered_lance.lore: Dreams of deicide reflected in ice.

fragments_of_the_shattered_lance.name: Fragments of the Shattered Lance
fragments_of_the_shattered_lance.lore: Crafted in desperation, seized with ambition.

affixes: +21% Lightning Cold Fire Spell Ability Property
+21 Physical Lightning Poison Elemental Ability Property

boardmans_fallacy.name: Boardman's Fallacy
affixes: +30–75% Physical Lightning Poison Elemental Ability Property

boardmans_legacy.name: Boardman's Legacy
affixes: +30–75% Physical Lightning Poison Elemental Ability Property

zerricks_guile.name: Zerrick's Guile
zerricks_guile.lore: Zerrick's humility and reverence for the Nagasa and the Scalebane leaders long kept him in their favour, sealing their demise.

zerricks_ambition.name: Zerrick's Ambition
zerricks_ambition.lore: In games of power you win or you die

gaspars_will.name: Gaspar's Will
gaspars_will.lore: I failed to protect. I failed to lead. Destruction is all that is left.

gaspars_acuity.name: Gaspar's Acuity
gaspars_acuity.lore: Knowledge without power is nothing but informed futility.

gaspars_insight.name: Gaspar's Insight
gaspars_insight.lore: Among the ruins what is wisdom, but empty platitudes?

sinathias_dying_breath.name: Sinathia's Dying Breath
sinathias_dying_breath.lore: As the last dagger plunged into Sinathia's body he uttered a dying curse, sealing the fate of his assassins.

sinathias_resurrection.name: Sinathia's Resurrection
affixes: +32–46% Fire Void Necrotic Poison Ability Property
sinathias_resurrection.lore: As the last of his assassins succumbed to their fates, Sinathia stirred within his tomb.

vilatrias_storm_crown.name: Vilatria's Storm Crown
vilatrias_storm_crown.lore: Studying at the great colleges of Welryn and Vul'Kaur, Vilatria perfected the art of Storm Magic. Yet a scholarly life never sated her ambition and she returned to the Lake kingdoms of central Eterra. Without a god to lead them, their lords and elders were proud and open to challenges of force. With the college of Welryn on their doorsteps, they were not unprepared for arcane challengers, but their wards could not protect them from the lightning that tore threw the roofs of their halls and smote them in their thrones, and so Vilatria claimed their kingdoms by force.

vilatrias_downfall.name: Vilatria's Downfall
vilatrias_downfall.lore: In her old age, Vilatria's hubris only grew. Having defeated all her human challengers, the storm queen's mind turned to Lagon, the fabled god of the sea and storms. With her apprentice, she sailed out from the border town of Etendell, along the estuary and out into the Fogrise sea. Lagon was said to dwell beneath the far seas beyond the western isles, yet the journey was quick for Vilatria as she fuelled her sails with winds of magic. Eventually she alighted at night upon a great isle of rock, coral, and ancient shrines. The moon spoke to her from its reflection flickering on the surface of the sea. It spoke with the voice of Lagon, and it spoke with amusement at her challenge, readily accepting, and opening the heavens. Thousands of years have passed and Vilatria is long dead, and her kingdom fractured, but the storms still rage upon the seas around that isle.

corsairs_boarding_shield.name: Corsair's Boarding Shield
affixes: +1 Necrotic Poison Elemental Level Of Skills
+1 Cold Void Poison Elemental Spell Level Of Skills
corsairs_boarding_shield.lore: Striking the Dreadnought would be their greatest feat yet, a win to remember that would silence those wishing to surrender to the Empire. However, for the captain freeing the whales was the true reward.

corsairs_blood_cowl.name: Corsair's Blood Cowl
affixes: +35–85% Cold Void Poison Elemental Spell Ability Property
corsairs_blood_cowl.lore: Standing up to the Empire, not giving in to temptation, the Corsairs of the Scoured Reefs are among the last standing men and women with running blood in their veins.

ferebors_chisel.name: Ferebor's Chisel
affixes: +1% Physical Lightning Cold Fire Necrotic Elemental Player Property
ferebors_chisel.lore: When Ferebor's collection of totems grew too large, he gathered his creations in a cave while his fellow nomads moved on without him. As the winters passed and his collection grew, other nomads would visit him to trade food and furs for totems crafted to defend their tribes.

ferebors_persistence.name: Ferebor's Persistence
ferebors_persistence.lore: Fifty winters since they first parted, Ferebor's tribe returned to his cave eager to purchase another totem. However, instead of finding the storied totem carver, they were driven away by his creations. Assuming him dead, they paid their respects and moved on, yet the number of totems around the cave continued to grow. Some say Ferebor still dwells there, cut off from the outside but carving totem after totem among the shadows.
